title: Antes Belladar
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:AntesBelladar.jpg]] |name=Antes Belladar |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], [[Reytha]]''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender= |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Fair |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Governor Belladar, why has this Rebel infiltration been tolerated so long?''"
"''I don't understand the question, Lord Vader.''"
"''Let me put it in simpler terms.''" [Vader Force-chokes Belladar]
"''Did that clarify things, Governor?|Darth Vader executes Antes Belladar for his failure to prevent a Rebel uprising|audio=BelladarChokes.flac|}} '''Antes Belladar''' was the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of the [[Agriworld/Legends|agricultural]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Reytha]] during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Reytha was taken over by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], which Belladar was unable to prevent. Eventually, he received assistance from the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who was able to [[Reytha campaign|eliminate]] the Rebels from several of Reytha's major [[City/Legends|cities]]. After Belladar discovered a Rebel presence in the [[Montrosa Islands]], Vader led his [[Imperial Army/Legends|army]] there. When he arrived at the islands, Vader [[Death/Legends|executed]] Belladar for failing to prevent the Alliance takeover and then eliminated the remaining Rebels from the planet. ==Biography== {{Dialogue|Soldier|Sir, we're receiving reports of Rebel activity in the islands of Montrosa.|Belladar|Are you certain, soldier?|Soldier|Yes, Governor.|Belladar|Lord Vader, I just received some terrible news.|Vader|Governor Belladar, my patience is wearing thin.|attr=A Reythan soldier, Belladar, and Vader|audio=BelladarsBadNews.flac|src=}} Antes Belladar was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and rose to the position of [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of the [[Agriworld/Legends|agricultural]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Reytha]] several [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. Belladar [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanded]] a token defense force on the world,[[Star Wars: Force and Destiny Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Force and Destiny'' Core Rulebook]] and in 0 ABY, during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a major conflict between the Empire and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], Belladar was unable to prevent the Alliance from taking over Reytha. To counter the Rebel threat, the governor was forced to request help from the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who had already discovered the Rebels' plan to take Reytha when he had [[Evacuation of Yavin|chased]] them off their [[Great Temple/Legends|base]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. Upon receiving the information, Vader left for Reytha immediately, knowing that the loss of its [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] supplies could severely damage the Empire. [[File:Reytha_campaign.jpg|thumb|left|280px|Belladar's failure to prevent the Rebel uprising on Reytha brought down the wrath of the Empire.]] Upon Vader's arrival, Belladar thanked him for responding so quickly to his call and reported that the Alliance was still preparing to attack the planet. However, a [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droid]] scan showed that the Rebels had already taken over Reytha. Vader planned to take the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]], [[Reytha Minor]], but first led his [[Imperial Army/Legends|army]] to attack and [[Reytha campaign|retake]] the smaller cities of [[Teks]] and [[Breeda]] for the Empire. After Vader did so, Belladar was surprised that he was able to defeat the Rebels in those cities. As soon as the Empire had gained enough [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]], it launched the assault on Reytha Minor and destroyed the Rebels' [[command center]]. Belladar then received a report from a [[Unidentified Reythan soldier|Reythan soldier]] that the Alliance had set up multiple bases in the planet's [[Montrosa Islands]]. Belladar relayed this to Vader, who then departed for the islands. Once Vader's [[Army/Legends|army]] arrived at the islands, Belladar told him of the structure the Rebels had set up in their bases. Vader, however, questioned the governor on how the Rebels had been allowed to infiltrate Reytha, but Belladar was not sure what Vader was asking. Deciding that the governor had failed the Empire for the last [[Time/Legends|time]], Vader used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to [[Telekinesis/Legends|strangle]] Belladar, [[Death/Legends|killing]] him. Vader then destroyed the Rebel bases in the Montrosa Islands and continued his search for the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]]. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|The weakness of Governor Belladar leads Lord Vader to suspect the Rebel infiltration extends further into Reytha.|Emperor's Hand Mara Jade, on the events at Reytha|audio=BelladarsWeakness.flac|}} Antes Belladar was able to achieve the position of governor of Reytha under the Empire, but several years on the relatively peaceful planet led many to believe that he had grown soft, and the Empire even considered the possibility that Belladar was a Rebel sympathizer. [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] saw the governor as being weak in his abilities. When [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Vader arrived on Reytha, Belladar gave outdated information to him, reporting that the Rebel Alliance was only preparing to attack when, in fact, it had already completed its takeover of the planet. Belladar preferred that tasks be completed by others on his behalf and complained of injuries when ordered to complete a task. Belladar was fair-skinned. ==Equipment== Belladar wore a [[Color/Legends|visor]] attached to an orange [[Armor/Legends|helmet]] that hid most of his face. He also wore a dark blue [[Clothing/Legends|tunic]], a shirt with orange sleeves, dark green pants and brown shoes. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|I really would rather not.|One of the lines randomly generated by Belladar in the level editor|audio=Antesrathernot.flac|}} [[File:JamesHoran.jpg|thumb|right|200px|James Horan, the actor who voiced Antes Belladar]] Antes Belladar was first mentioned in ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' by [[Steven L. Kent]],[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] released on [[November 7]], [[2001]].{{Amazon|url=Star-Wars-Galactic-Battlegrounds-Official/dp/0761537503|text=Star Wars Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide}} He then appeared in the [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'', released on [[November 11]], 2001,{{GameSpot|url=games/star-wars-galactic-battlegrounds|text=Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds}} where he was voiced by [[James Horan]]. Belladar's voice was heard in the second and third levels of the Imperial campaign, titled "Breaking Bread" and "Fire, Earth, Water and Air" respectively. Belladar's only physical appearance is in the game's scenario editor, where the player can use him as a uniqe unit. Belladar's first name is also only given in the level editor; in the campaign his character is only named as "Reytha Governor," with his last name being given in dialogue with Darth Vader. In ''Galactic Battlegrounds'', an inconsistency occurs involving Belladar. At the end of the first level of the Imperial campaign, the Empire finds intelligence on Yavin 4 that leads them to arrive at Reytha; however, at the start of the next level Belladar thanks Vader for responding to his call for help, and Vader asks why he has been summoned. This article assumes that the Empire found the intelligence on Yavin 4 and left for Reytha, and that Belladar requested Vader's assistance at the same time. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|soundcat=Audio files of Antes Belladar}} *''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] {{1stm}} *[[Star Wars: Force and Destiny Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Force and Destiny'' Core Rulebook]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |da=Antes Beladar }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Belladar, Antes}} [[Category:Governors of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]]
